zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Innes 10th of Innes, of that Ilk於1380年出生在英國蘇格蘭莫雷時，他的父親Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk20歲，母親Lady Janet de Aberchirder15歲。他於1405年之前與Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1456年7月14日在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Innes 10th of Innes, of that Ilk于1380年出生在英国苏格兰莫雷时，他的父亲Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk20岁，母亲Lady Janet de Aberchirder15岁。他于1405年之前与Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1456年7月14日在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Innes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of McInnis , from Gaelic Mag Aonghuis ‘son of Aonghus’.
Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Innes in Urquhart (Morayshire), named from Gaelic inis ‘island’.

variants.name: Ince
meanings: habitational name from Ince in Makerfield (Lancashire), Ince (Cheshire), or Ince Blundell (Lancashire). The placenames derive from Proto-Welsh ïnïs ‘island’.

possibly a post-medieval West Midlands variant of Hints, a habitational name from either of two places called Hints (Staffordshire, Shropshire). The placenames probably derive from Proto-Welsh hïnt ‘way, path’ + Middle English plural -es.

possibly a variant with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s of Inn, from residence at an inn or inns, from Middle English in (singular) or innes (plural) ‘tavern, lodging(s), tenement(s)’. There seems also to have been some confusion with Scottish Innes .

variants.name: Inch
meanings: English: perhaps, at least in some cases, a variant of   Ince  .

variants.name: McInnis
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Aonghuis, a patronymic from the personal name Aonghus (see Angus ). See also McInnes , compare Irish McGinnis .

variants.name: Inness
meanings: Scottish (Durham and Northumberland): variant of   Innes  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Innes 10th of Innes, of that Ilk was born in 1380, in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk, was 20 and his mother, Lady Janet de Aberchirder, was 15. He married Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes before 1405. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 14 July 1456, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Innes 10th of Innes, of that Ilk est né en 1380, à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Janet de Aberchirder, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes avant 1405. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 juillet 1456, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Innes 10th of Innes, of that Ilk 1380 in Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk 20 und seine Mutter Lady Janet de Aberchirder 15. Er hat vor 1405 Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Juli 1456 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Innes 10th of Innes, of that Ilk è nato il nel 1380 nel Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Lady Janet de Aberchirder, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes prima del 1405. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 luglio 1456, nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Innes 10th of Innes, of that Ilkが1380年にイギリススコットランドモーアイで生まれた時，父Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilkは20歳，母Lady Janet de Aberchirderは15歳であった。1405年以前にEuphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1456年7月14日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Innes 10th of Innes, of that Ilk(이)가 1380년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Janet de Aberchirder(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1405년 이전 Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1456년 7월 14일 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Innes 10th of Innes, of that Ilk nasceu em 1380, em Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady Janet de Aberchirder, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes antes 1405. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de julho de 1456, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Innes 10th of Innes, of that Ilk родился в 1380 г. в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Janet de Aberchirder, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes перед 1405 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 14 июля 1456 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter Innes 10th of Innes, of that Ilk nació en 1380, en Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady Janet de Aberchirder, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Euphemia-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, relic of Mackintosh, latterly of Innes antes de 1405. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de julio de 1456, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 76 años.
